title: crataegus texana var. dasyphylla
intro: Crataegus texana var. dasyphylla, also known as the Texas hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is a variant of the Crataegus texana species and is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus texana var. dasyphylla include reducing blood pressure, improving heart health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
